instruction: Suggest the correct car setup adjustment based on the driver feedback.

input.driver_feedback: Rear gets loose when I accelerate

output: Soften rear anti-roll bar to increase rear grip on corner exit.

instruction: Suggest the correct car setup adjustment based on the driver feedback.

input.driver_feedback: Front pushes wide in the middle of the corner

instruction: Suggest the correct car setup adjustment based on the driver feedback.

instruction: Suggest the correct car setup adjustment based on the driver feedback.

instruction: Suggest the correct car setup adjustment based on the driver feedback.

instruction: Suggest the correct car setup adjustment based on the driver feedback.
